thinking: I move forward through a long, bright cafe room toward a yellow rectangular table on the left where a single seated woman waits quietly. As I get closer and angle left, more of the kitchenette becomes visible behind her: blue lower cabinets, sink, pots, kettle, range hood, and a tall off-white refrigerator. The customer remains seated with a calm posture, occasionally shifting her gaze and keeping one hand near the tabletop as if waiting to be served or acknowledged. Near the end, I step up to the table and extend my hand toward the tabletop, appearing to place or point to a small white item in front of her.
caption: CLERK: Intent was to approach and serve/assist the seated customer, achieved by walking to her table and reaching out to place or indicate a small item on the table. CUSTOMER: Intent appeared to be waiting for service or an item, expressed by staying seated at the table, watching the clerk approach, and keeping attention on the tabletop.
